title: onosma malkarmayorum
intro: Onosma malkarmayorum, also known as Malkarmayorum or Golden Ragwort, is a plant species native to Turkey and Iran, belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Onosma malkarmayorum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in Turkish and Iranian folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
